name: Task History & Group Tracking
description: Persists completed task history, active queue snapshots, and aggregated task group states. Enables session recovery and historical reporting.

class TaskGroupState

  GroupName: string
  StartTime: DateTime
  TotalCount: int
  CompletedCount: int
  FailedCount: int
class TaskGroupEntry
  TaskId: string
  TaskNumber: int
  Description: string
  Status: AgentTaskStatus

  CompletionSummary: string
